claimText: University of Melbourne students must not upload personal information (full name, date of birth, address, or other confidential/sensitive/private information) to GenAI tools.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Protect your personal information and that of others. Do not upload your full name, date of birth, address or other confidential, sensitive or private information.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
